title: Bind Grabowski coding work context and Chronik retrieval
goal: Record the actual target repo, component and operation in Grabowski events and expose direct local import plus read-only history without Plexer.

acceptance.assertion: Task opt-in validates and persists repo, component, operation and optional Bureau/PR references.
One typed tool imports a redacted task outbox file into local Chronik idempotently.
One read-only tool returns bounded historical outcomes and mandatory live-state non-claims.
Chronik absence or import failure does not fail ordinary coding execution.

metadata.parallel_nonconflict: Disjoint from T040 agent-facing contract files and deployment paths.
metadata.outcome: Grabowski PR #402 implemented the optional Chronik coding-memory bridge, was repeatedly converged against concurrent main changes, hardened so every returned history event is independently bound to the requested target and filters, passed exact-tree validation, and merged by the receipt-bound Captain path as 1ca93f0bb6c9817c0a1910b4a73ed1a3f45320e3.

validation.full_pytest: 2994 passed, 3 skipped, 745 subtests passed on the byte-identical final tree

findings_fixed_before_merge: Chronik history trusted a matching query envelope without independently proving that every returned event matched the requested target and filters.

acceptance_evidence.explicit-work-context: Task opt-in validates and persists component, operation and optional Bureau/PR references; repository/host context is bound into emitted Chronik events.
acceptance_evidence.direct-import: Typed import reads a bounded regular outbox file, verifies hash/redaction and imports idempotently when the optional Chronik CLI is available.
acceptance_evidence.history-read: Read-only history is bounded and now independently verifies every event against source identity, event hash, target, filters and since bound before exposure; live-state and safe-retry non-claims remain explicit.
acceptance_evidence.fail-soft: Missing Chronik coding-memory CLI or import failure reports unavailable/failure evidence without failing ordinary coding execution.

metadata.verification_note: PR #402 was bound to final head 9fc9ebba167d81451f26616e9affe94a5b9b5b91 and raw GitHub diff SHA-256 16855d302980ec52b4aa8481d6caf6d380862700eed82908ee8d30f803b39821. The fully tested tree 2d29752646de9cf8bc5d6498d86d67a0d8db3b94 is byte-identical to squash merge 1ca93f0bb6c9817c0a1910b4a73ed1a3f45320e3. A separate follow-up T091 records the discovered Captain effect-model gap for GitHub auto branch deletion.
